title: 救救还在做原生 Mac 应用的孩子…哦不，中年人们。

content.summary: 救救还在做原生 Mac 应用的孩子…哦不，中年人们。 Tim Cook (@tim_cook) Mac just had its best launch week ever for first-time Mac customers. We love seeing the enthusiasm! — https://nitter.net/tim_cook/status/2034979891926769864#m
